en: Hi dad. Do you know what overwhelming means?
Overwhelming means, very great in amount.
It also means confusing or difficult to fight against.
ko: 또한 혼란스럽거나 맞서 싸우기 어렵다는 뜻도 있어.

en: Oh, I see. I have too much homework to do, I find it overwhelming. Can I use like this?
ko: 아 알겠어. 숙제가 너무 많아서 감당이 안 돼. 이렇게 쓸 수 있어?

en: Exactly. When you have too much homework to do, you have an overwhelming amount of work.
ko: 맞아. 숙제가 너무 많으면 감당할 수 없을 만큼 많은 양의 일이 있는 거야.

en: It means, the homework is too much, I find it difficult to do, right?
ko: 숙제가 너무 많아서 하기 어렵다는 뜻이지?

en: Yes. Also, when you are feeling a strong amount of sadness, this is an example of overwhelming sadness.
ko: 응. 또한 아주 강한 슬픔을 느낄 때, 이건 overwhelming sadness의 예시야.

en: Oh, it means that I don't know what to do, I am overwhelmed by sadness, right?
ko: 아, 그러면 어떻게 해야 할지 모르겠고, 슬픔에 압도당하는 거지?
